title: bidens asperata
intro: Bidens asperata, also known as asperat bidens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Bidens asperata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions for its medicinal uses.
